outcome: Found several crates hardcoding paths and versions instead of using workspace.

command: sed -i 's/tokmd-scan = { path = "\.\.\/tokmd-scan", version = ">=1.9, <2" }/tokmd-scan = { workspace = true }/g' crates/tokmd-analysis-types/Cargo.toml
sed -i 's/tokmd-core = { path = "\.\.\/tokmd-core", version = ">=1.9, <2" }/tokmd-core = { workspace = true }/g' crates/tokmd-envelope/Cargo.toml
sed -i 's/tokmd-model = { path = "\.\.\/tokmd-model", version = ">=1.9, <2" }/tokmd-model = { workspace = true }/g' crates/tokmd-scan/Cargo.toml
sed -i 's/tokmd-scan = { path = "\.\.\/tokmd-scan", version = ">=1.9, <2" }/tokmd-scan = { workspace = true }/g' crates/tokmd-types/Cargo.toml
sed -i 's/tokmd-format = { path = "\.\.\/tokmd-format", version = ">=1.9, <2" }/tokmd-format = { workspace = true }/g' crates/tokmd-types/Cargo.toml
sed -i 's/tokmd-model = { path = "\.\.\/tokmd-model", version = ">=1.9, <2" }/tokmd-model = { workspace = true }/g' crates/tokmd-types/Cargo.toml
sed -i 's/tokmd-types = { path = "\.\.\/tokmd-types", version = ">=1.9, <2" }/tokmd-types = { workspace = true }/g' crates/tokmd-wasm/Cargo.toml
CI=true cargo test --verbose -p tokmd-cockpit -p tokmd-analysis-types -p tokmd-envelope -p tokmd-scan -p tokmd-types -p tokmd-wasm
